nasb.text: Now therefore, listen to me and return the captives whom you captured from your brothers, for the burning anger of the Lord is against you.”

esv.text: Now hear me, and send back the captives from your relatives whom you have taken, for the fierce wrath of the Lord is upon you.”

cnv.text: 你們現在要聽我的話，把你們擄回來的兄弟釋放回去，因為耶和華的震怒已經臨到你們身上了。”

ccb.text: 你们还是听我的忠告，释放你们掳来的同胞，让他们回去吧！因为耶和华的烈怒已经临到你们了。”
